article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas: Crew Card Changes!!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about the changes to the Star Atlas crew cards.
Star Atlas: Tensor Tutorial
Beyond the Horizon posted a video of a tutorial about Tensor.
STAR ATLAS #250 6 ANOMALY CREW!? WHAT!? TENSOR TRADING IS LIVE!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about Star Atlas updates.
Metaverse Nomads #161 Star Atlas Crew Cards Episode 1
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #144
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
The Atlas Brew #126
Star Atlas TV posted a video of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas SAGE Beginner Guide & Tips For New Players (Q3 2024)
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of a beginner guide for Star Atlas SAGE.
The Lore Keepers #7
Star Atlas TV posted a video of the latest Lore Keepers.
Star Atlas Personality Traits
OCG Thor posted a video about crew personality traits.
